creator: acm@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi

Guys take on mind jitsi (jitsi-web) can't be updated alone if another components are not updated because it is easy to broken some things. But it can be update if it is a minor release

Michael, thanks for patch file. I was working on it some months ago (jitsi did a big changes with config stuff) but prosody had lot of problems and 
they were resolved on latest versions. I prefer keep maintaining of these ports but if you want I could give you implicit approval for changes you want to do. It is good count with help sometimes

Let me review your patch file
